pe:description: Codified validation rules for DS-ONT business rules BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008. Applied during PE-DS-EXTRACT-001 Phase 3 (GATE-3). Rules 001–006 are defined in the DS-ONT ontology source; 007–008 are process-defined validation constraints.

validationRules.rule: IF token.tier = 'Semantic' THEN token MUST reference a known primitive token or raw hex value
validationRules.rationale: Semantic tokens must derive from primitives for consistency

validation.condition: token.lightModeValue or token.darkModeValue must either (a) match a PrimitiveToken.value in the same instance, or (b) be a valid hex colour (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA)
validation.passWhen: All semantic token values trace to a primitive or are valid hex
validation.failMessage: Semantic token '{tokenName}' value '{value}' does not reference a known primitive

exemptions: Direct hex values are acceptable when no explicit primitive scale exists (common in Figma-extracted brands)
Derived values (opacity adjustments, programmatic lightening) are exempt

validationRules.rule: IF token.tier = 'Component' THEN token MUST reference a semantic token
validationRules.rationale: Component tokens must use semantic tokens for design intent — never reference primitives directly

validation.condition: token.ds:referencesToken must resolve to a SemanticToken @id in the same instance
validation.passWhen: All component tokens reference a valid semantic token
validation.failMessage: Component token '{tokenName}' references '{referencesToken}' which is not a SemanticToken

validationRules.rule: IF component.allowsOverrides = true THEN component MUST have at least one ComponentToken binding
validationRules.rationale: Components that support customization must accept overrides via token bindings

validation.condition: IF ds:allowsOverrides = true THEN count(ComponentTokens where ds:componentName matches) >= 1
validation.passWhen: All overridable components have at least one binding
validation.failMessage: DesignComponent '{componentName}' allows overrides but has zero ComponentToken bindings

validationRules.note: Components with allowsOverrides=false or no DesignComponent entities in the instance are exempt

validationRules.rule: IF designSystem.themeModeSupport = true THEN semantic tokens SHOULD have both light and dark mode values
validationRules.rationale: Theme mode support requires mode-specific token values for proper switching

validation.condition: token must have both ds:lightModeValue AND ds:darkModeValue
validation.passWhen: All semantic tokens have both mode values, OR darkModeStatus is explicitly 'pending'
validation.failMessage: Semantic token '{tokenName}' missing {missingMode}ModeValue (theme mode support is enabled)

exemptions: darkModeStatus = 'defined-in-css-pending-figma-extraction' — dark mode values extracted from CSS fallback, not yet in Figma
New brands where dark mode design is not yet complete — severity demoted to info

validationRules.rule: IF figmaSource.lastSyncedAt is older than 7 days THEN trigger sync warning
validationRules.rationale: Design tokens should be synced regularly to stay current with design

validation.passWhen: FigmaSource was synced within the last 7 days
validation.failMessage: FigmaSource '{figmaFileKey}' last synced {daysSince} days ago — consider re-extraction

validationRules.note: This is an operational freshness check, not a structural integrity check

validationRules.rule: IF BrandVariant.tokenOverrides contains a token THEN that token.mutabilityTier MUST equal 'PF-Instance'
validationRules.rationale: Brand variants must only override PF-Instance tokens. PF-Core tokens (spacing, radius, typography scale, component dimensions) are structurally immutable and must remain consistent across all brands to preserve layout integrity.

validation.passWhen: All brand overrides target PF-Instance tier tokens only
validation.failMessage: Brand '{brandName}' overrides token '{tokenName}' which has mutabilityTier '{tier}' (must be PF-Instance)

mutabilityTiers.PF-Core: Structurally immutable — spacing scale, radius scale, typography scale, component dimensions. Never overridden by brands.
mutabilityTiers.PF-Instance: Brand-customisable — colours, font families, accent values. Overridable per brand variant.

validationRules.rule: Each entity type MUST have all required properties populated
validationRules.rationale: Incomplete entities cause parsing failures in ds-loader.js parseDSInstance()

validation.passWhen: All entities have all required properties with non-null values

validationRules.rule: All 14 CSS-var-required semantic token names MUST be present in the instance
validationRules.rationale: The visualiser's generateCSSVars() function maps these 14 token names to CSS custom properties. Missing tokens cause undefined CSS variables and visual rendering failures.

validation.passWhen: All 14 token names found in SemanticToken collection
validation.failMessage: Missing required semantic token '{tokenName}' — generateCSSVars() will produce undefined CSS variable

gateDefinition.passCriteria: Zero severity=error violations across BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008
gateDefinition.warningPolicy: severity=warning violations are logged but do not block the gate

verifiedAgainst.notes: 44P + 75S + 15C = 134 tokens, all 14 required names present, BR-DS-004 warning (dark mode pending)
